text: A giraffe eating from a branch above while a girl stands next to the enclosure.
A microwave on top of a small table.
The meal on the plate has slices of banana next to a glass of wine.
A small boy standing in the middle of a living room wearing big white sneakers.
a person riding a skate board on a city street
A man wears an umbrella hat and blows up a balloon.
Two giraffes  against a feeding station in a stone-like enclosure.
A woman biting into a large piece of pizza on a plate.
A set of luggage bags and purses are on display.
An unfinished bathroom with only a toilet in it.
